summary: Iteration 2 (Profile system + section/stage visibility + icon picker + phone/LINE/resume + scroll bar) fully validated. Backend: 27/27 pytest pass. Frontend: all e2e flows PASS including profile create, section toggle, career stage reorder/hide, thesis icon picker, contact phone/line/resume rendering, set-default -> / route, projects with no image show no placeholder box, scroll-progress-bar present on both / and /p/:slug. Cleanup restored main as default and deleted TEST_ profile.
critical_code_review_comments: get_current_user still reads cookies before Bearer even though frontend uses only Bearer tokens (harmless dead branch).
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — invalid combo per browser spec; currently no cookies used so no runtime failure, but tighten before enabling cookie auth.

PUT /api/profiles/{slug} uses ContentUpdate with extra='allow' and stores payload.content verbatim — no schema validation, so an admin (or bad import JSON) could corrupt structure. backfill_content only patches on GET, not on write.

delete_profile checks count<=1 BEFORE checking existence, so DELETE of a non-existent slug returns 400 when only one profile remains (test_b works around this by creating a temp profile first). Consider re-ordering: existence check → count check.
Upload endpoint stores base64 inside content documents when used for icons/hero/project images — can bloat MongoDB doc size for many uploads; consider file/GridFS storage for production.
seed_profiles migrates from legacy site_content but never deletes the legacy doc — safe but leaves stale data.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ profile created during e2e run and deleted at end. main profile reset to demo defaults and re-set as default via API + UI cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now covers full profile CRUD (create/PUT/PATCH rename+slug+is_default/DELETE with default promotion/reset/last-profile guard/unauth). TestProfileCRUD.teardown_class handles cleanup (session-scope autouse was removed because pytest-xdist runs sessions per-worker and would delete TEST profiles mid-run on another worker). Playwright flow at /admin uses window.prompt/confirm — handle each with page.once('dialog', ...); using page.on() will bind for all dialogs and cause 'Dialog already handled' errors on subsequent set-default/delete. Scroll-progress-bar test-id is 'scroll-progress-bar' inside ScrollProgress.jsx. Icon picker testids follow pattern thesis-item-{i}-icon-{key} (e.g. -brain). Profile default slug is 'main' (name '主要版本').
